auth.securityMessage: 🔒 Secure OAuth 2.0 login — Briefly never accesses your personal emails

jsonLd.websiteDescription: AI summaries of your newsletters in 2 minutes a day

summaries.title: My summaries
summaries.empty: Your first summaries will arrive tomorrow morning!
summaries.error: Unable to load your summaries. Please try again.
summaries.newCount: {count} new summar{count, plural, one {y} other {ies}} available

newsletters.title: My newsletters
newsletters.subtitle: Manage the newsletters that Briefly summarizes for you.
newsletters.empty: Add your first newsletter and forward it to your Briefly address.

modal.title: Add a newsletter
modal.description: Enter the newsletter name and optionally the sender email address.
modal.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

inbox.title: Your forwarding address
inbox.description: Forward your newsletters to this address to receive them in Briefly.

subscription.title: Active Premium subscription
subscription.error: Unable to open the billing portal. Please try again.

checkout.success: Welcome to Briefly Premium! Your subscription is active.
checkout.canceled: Checkout canceled. You can subscribe at any time.
checkout.alreadySubscribed: You are already subscribed to Briefly Premium.

account.title: Account
account.edit_hint: To update your email or avatar, click on your avatar above.

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.description: Account deletion is permanent and irreversible.
danger_zone.dialog_description_1: This action is irreversible. All your data will be deleted: newsletters, summaries, settings and subscription.
danger_zone.dialog_description_2: Your paid subscription will be cancelled immediately with no pro-rata refund.

meta.title: Briefly — AI Newsletter Summaries | Free
meta.description: Briefly transforms your newsletters into concise AI summaries. Save 5h/week. Free for 5 newsletters.
meta.og_description: Transform your newsletters into AI summaries in 30 seconds. Free, no credit card required.

hero.headline: Stop drowning in newsletters. Start reading what matters.
hero.subheadline: Briefly uses AI to turn your newsletters into concise summaries you can read in 30 seconds. Save 5 hours a week, effortlessly.

dual_llm.title: Dual LLM AI
dual_llm.description: Two AI models work together: one for speed, one for depth. You always get the best summary.

auto_summary.title: Automatic summaries
auto_summary.description: Your newsletters are summarized the moment they arrive. Open the app, read the highlights, done.

categories.title: Smart categorization
categories.description: Automatically organized by topic — Tech, Finance, Culture, or any theme you create.

social_proof.title: Trusted by professionals who value their time

testimonial.quote: I used to spend an hour every morning skimming newsletters. Now I get the key insights in 5 minutes with my coffee.
testimonial.author: Sarah M.

cta.title: Your newsletters, summarized. Every morning.
cta.subtitle: Join professionals who start their day informed, not overwhelmed.

pricing.meta_description: Free or Premium, choose the plan that works for you. Save 5h/week with Briefly.
pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.data_collected_intro: Briefly only collects data necessary for the service to function: your email address (via Google or Microsoft OAuth), the newsletters you choose to follow, and the summaries generated for your account.
privacy.data_collected_email_note: Briefly never accesses your personal inbox.
privacy.data_collected_email_method: Newsletter ingestion is done via a dedicated email address ({uuid}@mail.briefly.app).
privacy.data_usage_summaries: AI summary generation from received newsletters
privacy.gdpr_intro: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.gdpr_delete: You can also delete your account directly from Settings → Account → Delete my account.
privacy.contact_intro: For any questions regarding data protection:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.purpose_text: Briefly is an automatic newsletter summarization service powered by artificial intelligence. By using Briefly, you accept these Terms of Service.
terms.account_text: Access to the service requires creating an account via Google or Microsoft OAuth. You are responsible for the security of your account.
terms.tier_free: Free tier: 5 newsletters maximum, 1 premium summary/day
terms.tier_paid: Paid tier ($5/month): unlimited newsletters, all summaries with premium LLM
terms.acceptable_use_text: The service is intended for personal use. It is prohibited to resell, redistribute, or use generated summaries for commercial purposes without prior agreement.
terms.termination_text: You can cancel your subscription at any time from Settings → Billing. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period.
terms.liability_text: Summaries are automatically generated by AI. Briefly does not guarantee their accuracy and is not responsible for decisions made based on these summaries.
